<!-- Thanks for contributing to Narwhal! -->

## What & why
<!-- Summarize the change and the motivation. Link issues: "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / check
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated (`python -m unittest discover -s skills/seo-scan/tests`)
- [ ] Ran the affected script against a real URL and eyeballed the report
- [ ] Works with **only the standard library** (no new hard dependency), or the dep is optional + auto-detected
- [ ] Kept output **fix-first** and honest (no fabricated metrics)
- [ ] Updated docs / references if behavior changed

## Notes for reviewers
<!-- Anything worth calling out: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots of report output. -->
